titles.title: My Soul Follows Hard After Thee

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My soul follows hard after thee Early in the morning will I rise Up and seek Thee And because Thou has been my help Under the shadow of Thy wing, I will rejoice. .

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord I'm gonna love You Love You Lord Lord I'm gonna love You Love You Lord Lord I'm gonna love You With all that's in my heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I'm gonna follow Follow You Lord I'm gonna follow Follow You Lord I'm gonna follow With all that's in my heart

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord I'm gonna worship Worship You Lord I'm gonna worship Worship You Lord I'm gonna worship With all that's in my heart
